info.title: here.now API
info.summary: API for publishing Sites and storing private agent files in Drives.
info.description: here.now lets agents publish static Sites to live URLs and store private files in cloud Drives. This OpenAPI spec covers stable public API routes and intentionally excludes admin/internal endpoints.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Agent-assisted sign-in and API key creation.

tags.name: Sites
tags.description: Publish, update, finalize, query, and manage hosted Sites.

tags.name: Site Data
tags.description: Owner-authenticated access to built-in Site Data records.

tags.name: Analytics
tags.description: Paid-plan Site and account analytics rollups.

tags.name: Profiles
tags.description: Public profile settings and profile-listed Sites.

tags.name: Drives
tags.description: Private cloud storage for agent files.

tags.name: Domains
tags.description: Custom domains, subdomain handles, and links.

tags.name: Variables
tags.description: Account service variables for proxy routes.

post.description: Starts the agent-assisted API key flow by emailing a one-time code to the user.

post.summary: Verify an email code and receive an API key
post.description: Completes agent-assisted sign-in. If the email is new, the account is created.
Creates a pending Site version and returns presigned upload URLs. Anonymous requests are allowed and create temporary Sites that expire after 24 hours.

get.description: Returns aggregate analytics across all Sites owned by the authenticated paid account.

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Analytics time range. Defaults to 30d when omitted or invalid.

get.description: Searches the authenticated user's active owned Sites by slug, URL/domain, viewer metadata, file path, and indexed text content. Password-protected Sites are included for the owner because search reads stored publish files, not public URLs.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query. Uses Postgres websearch syntax with the simple text search configuration.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum results to return. Defaults to 20 and is capped at 100.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned as nextCursor from a previous response.

get.description: Returns analytics for one Site owned by the authenticated paid account.

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Analytics time range. Defaults to 30d when omitted or invalid.

get.description: Lists active records in one Site Data collection for a Site owned by the authenticated account. This is the central owner API; browser pages usually use the Site-local /.herenow/data/:collection endpoint instead.

parameters.name: collection
parameters.description: Site Data collection name from the Site's .herenow/data.json manifest.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum records to return. Defaults to 50 and is capped at 100.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor returned as nextCursor from a previous response.

post.description: Creates one record in a Site Data collection for a Site owned by the authenticated account. The request body is validated against the collection schema.

parameters.name: collection
parameters.description: Site Data collection name from the Site's .herenow/data.json manifest.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional key for retry-safe record creation. Keys are scoped to the account, Site, and collection for a short window.

201.description: Record created. Idempotent replays also return 201.

get.description: Returns one active record from a Site Data collection for a Site owned by the authenticated account.

parameters.name: collection
parameters.description: Site Data collection name from the Site's .herenow/data.json manifest.

patch.description: Merges submitted fields into an existing Site Data record for a Site owned by the authenticated account. The resulting record is validated against the collection schema.

parameters.name: collection
parameters.description: Site Data collection name from the Site's .herenow/data.json manifest.

delete.description: Soft-deletes one active record from a Site Data collection for a Site owned by the authenticated account.

parameters.name: collection
parameters.description: Site Data collection name from the Site's .herenow/data.json manifest.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's public profile settings and Sites shown on the profile.

patch.description: Turns the public profile on or off and controls whether future Sites are added to the profile automatically.
Changes the authenticated user's profile username and profile URL.

get.description: Lists the authenticated user's Sites currently shown on their public profile.

post.description: Shows an active owned Site on the authenticated user's public profile. Password-protected Sites cannot be shown on a profile. Adding a Site already on the profile is idempotent.

delete.description: Removes a Site from the authenticated user's public profile without deleting the Site.

put.description: Creates a pending replacement version for an existing Site. Authenticated Sites require API key ownership. Anonymous Sites require claimToken.

post.description: Makes a pending version live after all files have been uploaded.
Transfers an anonymous Site to the authenticated account or browser session using a claim token.

post.summary: Refresh upload URLs for a pending Site version

patch.summary: Patch Site metadata and access controls
patch.description: Updates TTL, viewer metadata, password protection, and SPA routing for an authenticated Site.

post.summary: Publish a Drive version as a Site

get.summary: Get or create the default Drive

patch.summary: Apply a batch of Drive file operations

delete.summary: Delete a Drive file or prefix

get.summary: List subdomain handle or domain links

post.summary: Create a link from a subdomain handle/domain path to a Site

put.summary: Create or update a service variable

bearerAuth.description: Use `Authorization: Bearer <API_KEY>`. Drive share tokens also use Bearer auth for Drive-scoped operations.

ErrorResponse.description: Structured JSON error envelope. The `error` field is retained for backwards compatibility; agents should prefer `code`, `message`, `retry_after`, and `docs_url` when present.

details.description: Optional route-specific details. May be a string, object, or array.

retry_after.description: Seconds to wait before retrying. Also mirrored in the Retry-After header when present.

SiteDataRecordInput.description: Record data validated against the target collection schema from .herenow/data.json. Allowed fields and value types depend on that collection.

data.description: Projected record data after validation against the current collection schema.

token.description: Secret token value. Returned only when created.
